query:
-- Check if any of these MSISDNs appear in services in any format
SELECT externalId, phoneNumber, serviceType, planName, customerExternalId, customerName
FROM services
WHERE phoneNumber IN (
  '0493802664', '0493834640', '0493835175', '0493837165', '0494655563', '0494655895',
  '0493803414', '0493834375', '0493834397', '0493834429', '0493834499', '0493834594',
  '0493834657', '0494655764', '0494655765'
);
